description: External tools required for the binary-compressed checkpoint phase (additional tools beyond build-infra)

libssl-dev.description: OpenSSL development files (required for SHA-512 hashing in compression tools)
libssl-dev.notes: Ubuntu 24.04 uses OpenSSL 3.0.13. Required for static linking SHA-512 hash calculation in ELF decompressor.

notes: LZFSE library is a build dependency used by LIEF builds
Compression now uses zstd (Zstandard) across all platforms
On Linux/Windows: Builds automatically from lzfse git submodule
No manual installation required - handled by build system
